description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of a human figure, with elongated and twisted limbs and body parts. The form is stretched and fragmented, with thin, ribbon-like extensions and irregular, angular shapes. There are hints of anatomical features such as a head, torso, and limbs, but they are heavily deformed and lack realistic proportions. The surface is mostly smooth with some areas of subtle texture, and the object displays a mix of dark and light tones with some red accents. The overall appearance is surreal and does not resemble a typical pedestrian adult in urban environments. The structure seems fragile and insubstantial, with large open spaces and minimal solid volume.
description: A surreal, highly distorted humanoid form with elongated, twisted limbs and fragmented body parts, featuring smooth surfaces and abstract shapes.
description_view_0: From this angle, the elongated limbs and twisted torso are most prominent, with thin extensions radiating outward.
description_view_1: This view highlights the angular, fragmented lower body and the irregular, stretched appendages.
description_view_2: The side perspective shows the abstract curvature of the limbs and the minimal, insubstantial torso.
description_view_3: Here, the back and side of the figure are visible, emphasizing the open, airy structure and the surreal, ribbon-like extensions.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract, unrecognizable garment shapes with no clear style or type
attribute_posture: highly distorted, twisted, and fragmented stance
